name: 🤷 No Plan Tonight

ingredients.item: bread (the good stuff, not the heels)
peanut butter (crunchy or smooth — fight me)
jelly (grape, strawberry, or whatever's not crunchy)

steps: Open the fridge. Stare at the leftovers. They're not leftovers anymore — they're a science experiment.
Close the fridge. Open the pantry. Notice we have rice, three kinds of pasta, and a single can of black beans.
Acknowledge: tonight is a PB&J night, and that's okay. PB&J is a complete protein. Probably.
Toast the bread (optional, but it makes you feel like a chef).
Apply peanut butter to one slice, jelly to the other. Use more than you think you need. The structural integrity of the sandwich depends on it.
Press together. Cut diagonally (fancy) or straight across (practical).
Serve with a glass of milk and a deep, philosophical sigh.
Add a side of: grapes? an apple? a single baby carrot? Whatever's not wilted.
Sit down. Eat. Do not check the calendar to see what the plan said yesterday.
time: 4 min (or 40 if you also do the dishes)
